{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192434A00CB970C40ECC3346CB"}"},"total":526},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7195899669212316451","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书特别特别好看，男女主还有那些配角们都特别特别幸福，然后这都是我羡慕的爱情，作者笔下的人物就是人物特别的清晰和生动，尤其是看到后面那会儿，捐献器官的时候就哭了，报废了好多纸，两边都是病人，一个家长的女儿去世了，然后就是另一个就是还有几天就要去世真的因为这个哭了好久，然后看到后面就特别特别的幸福，然后呢，就感觉这是我看的一本让我说来说特别好的书，希望作者未来能出比这本书还要精彩和好看的书，作者，我爱你，么么哒😘"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1675426007,"group_id":"7172867783602998272","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+GN1y9ww39oZMKogCnvF5fY4OhVOrg4izFKZqNpRktG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c60cf88a400b4c5395867b230154a823~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795471&x-signature=gEXtwDA3SXGt8E1GQQazl7Xlb%2B4%3D","user_id":"2722034735395021","user_name":"窝包爱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2722034735395021","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7172867783602998272","book_info":{"abstract":"［甜宠+软萌+电竞+大神+cp］
作为一名在校大学生，时愿每天的业余爱好就是峡谷一日游，“日常被虐4小时”的她突然有一天变得不一样了……
好友一：时小愿，你前两天不还是钻石吗，怎么今天就上王者了。
好友二：时小愿，你又背着我们和那个狗男人双排呢！！
好友三：我k，你们快来看，时小愿在外面有狗了！！
许沐白：LM战队队长兼中路选手，少年一战成名，人们说“有沐神就有奇迹”！
某天晚上，刚训练完的许沐白突发奇想登上了自己不常用的小号，没想到就是这么一次普通的排位里，以碾压的方式带着队友拿下胜利后，就被自家呆呆笨笨的辅助缠上了，
“大神大神，组队吗”
“大神，加个好友吧！”
“大神……”
自此，男人身后就多了一条小尾巴，峡谷里多了一对形影不离的身影。
后来……
看着昔日里一脸禁欲此刻化身为狼的大神，时愿欲哭无泪，只能抬起湿漉漉的双眼委屈巴巴的开始求饶……
然而为时已晚，看着主动送到嘴里的香软小白兔，早有预谋的大灰狼怎么会放过，当然是一口吞掉了！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2odc17ce2a438c2d214bc7447fc2a3f6ae~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"一颗橙子皮","author_id":"","book_id":"7172867783602998272","book_name":"电竞大佬的软萌小娇妻","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0f0f0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5183人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":749,"name":"青春甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=749&name=青春甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7172873094225363460","read_count":"5183","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"252767"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"121","tags":"青春甜宠,现代言情,校园,甜宠,大佬,双洁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/33002572a074165dd354e8d91c1c5a83~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449074&x-signature=O8YGga1yz1uwNCStkEekA9etYPI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3795167853950167","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.0788571e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192434A00CB970C40ECC3346CB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点
